title: dimeria idukkiensis
intro: Dimeria idukkiensis, also known as Idukki grass, is a type of grass species native to the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with studies indicating its potential in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Dimeria idukkiensis is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, which can be used to treat various health ailments.
